ddls:
CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Name of the video file */,
  "full_path" TEXT /* Full path to the video file */,
  "duration_seconds" REAL /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  "duration_hours" TEXT /* Duration of the video in hours */,
  "frame_count" INTEGER /* Number of frames in the video */,
  "fps" INTEGER /* Frames per second (FPS) of the video */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the video in pixels */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the video in pixels */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the video in kilobytes */,
  "size_bytes" REAL /* Size of the video in bytes */,
  "aspect_ratio_fraction" REAL /* Aspect ratio of the video as a fraction */,
  "aspect_ratio" REAL /* Aspect ratio of the video as a decimal value */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video format */,
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video resolution */,
  "aspect_ratio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aspect ratio */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the video was last modified */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the video */,
  "thumbnail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video thumbnail */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the video is public or private */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_aspect_ratio_id FOREIGN KEY ("aspect_ratio_id") REFERENCES aspect_ratios ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_resolution_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolution_id") REFERENCES video_resolutions ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_thumbnail_id FOREIGN KEY ("thumbnail_id") REFERENCES video_thumbnails ("thumbnail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES video_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES video_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_staff" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is a staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the video */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the video was viewed */,
  "view_duration_seconds" REAL /* Duration of the view in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for viewing (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_views_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user liking the video */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date the video was liked */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for liking (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user commenting on the video */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for commenting (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is flagged for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format (e.g. MP4, AVI) */,
  "mime_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the video format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution */,
  "resolution_name" TEXT /* Name of the resolution (e.g. 1080p, 720p) */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the resolution in pixels */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the resolution in pixels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aspect_ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aspect ratio */,
  "ratio_name" TEXT /* Name of the aspect ratio (e.g. 16:9, 4:3) */,
  "aspect_ratio_decimal" REAL /* Aspect ratio as a decimal value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_tags_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being categorized */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_categories_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accumulated_video_views" (
  "accumulated_view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accumulated view */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being viewed */,
  "accumulated_views" INTEGER /* Accumulated number of views for the video */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the accumulated views were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accumulated_view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accumulated_video_views_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accumulated_video_likes" (
  "accumulated_like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accumulated like */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being liked */,
  "accumulated_likes" INTEGER /* Accumulated number of likes for the video */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the accumulated likes were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accumulated_like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accumulated_video_likes_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accumulated_video_comments" (
  "accumulated_comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accumulated comment */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being commented on */,
  "accumulated_comments" INTEGER /* Accumulated number of comments for the video */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the accumulated comments were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accumulated_comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accumulated_video_comments_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being analyzed */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g. loudness, tempo) */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the audio feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_thumbnails" (
  "thumbnail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thumbnail */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being thumbnailed */,
  "thumbnail_image" TEXT /* Image data for the thumbnail */,
  "thumbnail_format" TEXT /* Format of the thumbnail image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "thumbnail_size" INTEGER /* Size of the thumbnail image in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thumbnail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_thumbnails_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_video_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting with the video */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being interacted with */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g. view, like, comment) */,
  "interaction_duration_seconds" REAL /* Duration of the interaction in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the interaction (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_video_interactions_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_video_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
